creator: kaduk-fbsd@mit.edu
text:
I'm pretty sure that Chris and Jason both saw on IRC, but for the record, 
removing the setting of ECHO_MSG is fine.
I have vague purity reasons to prefer setting IGNORE over multiple 
lines (using backslash-continuations) but dropping the newline escape 
sequences, but putting it all on one line also works, so I don't really 
care.

-Ben Kaduk
